message:
feat(fp-frame): add pivot_table aggfunc-dict parity (frankenpandas-7n5h)

Adds DataFrame::pivot_table_aggfunc_dict(value_aggs, index, columns)
matching pd.pivot_table(values=[...], aggfunc={'col1':'sum','col2':'mean'}) —
each value column gets its own aggregation function. Result columns are
prefixed {value_col}_{pivot_column}, matching pivot_table_multi_values'
naming. Duplicates and empty input are rejected. Unknown aggfuncs and
missing columns bubble up from the single-value pivot_table call.
5 new tests: per-column agg, empty rejection, duplicate rejection,
single-value equivalence, unknown-aggfunc propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
